title: Amtech C3155 Radiator hex Key
features: DURABLE: This versatile radiator hex key is made from heavy duty, zinc plated high tensile steel
VERSATILE: With a 13mm (1/2”) hexagonal end and a 10mm (3/8″), this key is ideal for installing or removing 13mm (1/2”) BSP radiator valve tails and vent plugs
SIZE CAPACITY: 2inch range ideal for plumbing and trade tasks
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering.
